allow: Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(f'Total: {d[\\"total\\"]}'\); [print\(r\) for r in d['reports'][:3]]")
Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('Total:', d.get\('total'\)\); [print\(r['company_name'], r['category'], r['period']\) for r in d.get\('reports', []\)[:3]]")
Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(p\) for p in d['paths'].keys\(\)]")
